introSection: Wally Whales Deep Dive Adventure, also referred to as Young Star Coaster, is a steel roller coaster located at Farglory Ocean Park in Hualien, Hualien County, Taiwan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster is an Family Coaster 207 installation from Vekoma. After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

fullText:
Wally Whales Deep Dive Adventure, also referred to as Young Star Coaster, is a steel roller coaster located at Farglory Ocean Park in Hualien, Hualien County, Taiwan.

The coaster is an Family Coaster 207 installation from Vekoma. After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.
